raw_response: The ASUS ZenBook 14 is an excellent choice for budget-conscious office use. With a remarkable OLED display and lightweight design, it offers great value under $900. Its Intel Core Ultra 5 processor provides decent performance, though it's less powerful than higher-tier options. The laptop includes 16GB RAM and has a long battery life of up to 13 hours, making it ideal for daily office tasks without breaking the bank.
